title: Interrogation Outcome
content:
Arthur: 'I made the reservation under the alias 'Mr. Sterling' for 8:30 PM. Thomas explicitly told me to wipe the entry from his digital calendar immediately after. He was terrified of anyone tracking that meeting.'

📊 OUTCOME: You successfully got the booking details from Arthur.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Reservation at 'The Blackwood' was booked under the alias 'Mr. Sterling' at 8:30 PM.
📉 You lose 1 Action Point.
